model.reproducibility_notes: Fresh independent cycle-two semantic review was completed against target content commit 8b199f13268d173b4a0c026145f5cea6975f1d4b. This record formalizes that same completed invocation after generic validator current-revision projection was fixed at implementation commit 71dc7f009d94170f5342cb1de8770d79f1ce9acb; no new semantic research was performed during formalization. Exact deployed model snapshot, system fingerprint, sampling parameters, service tier, and provider-verifiable invocation ID were not exposed; invocation_id is a local stable identity.
